title: psydrax kingii
intro: Psydrax kingii, also known as the Red Bead Tree or King's Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain bioactive compounds with antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psydrax kingii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as promoting wound healing and improving respiratory health. Psydrax kingii is typically prepared for medicinal use in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and is often consumed as a tea or applied topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
